overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rain-soaked rooftop plaza in a cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from a covered walkway past palm trees toward an illuminated infinity pool overlooking the neon-lit skyline. High-end modern architecture with glass facades and vibrant neon signage creates a moody, atmospheric scene typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered rooftop walkway with tropical landscaping

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open rooftop plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway, moving toward the open plaza area ahead

entered.detail: overhead roof structure providing shelter from rain
transparent safety barrier along the walkway edge
tropical palm tree lining the walkway
modern glass building with red and blue neon signage
tall illuminated post providing ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rain-sheltered rooftop walkway with glass railings and palm trees. The camera moves forward under artificial lighting, approaching the transition to an open plaza. Neon-lit modern buildings line the right side while the city skyline is visible ahead through the hazy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop plaza with lounge seating

events.description: swimming pool comes into view in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza, passing lounge chairs while approaching the pool area

entered.detail: wooden lounge chairs arranged on the plaza deck
large rectangular pool with illuminated edges visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide rooftop plaza exposed to the heavy rain. Lounge chairs are scattered across the tiled surface as the camera advances toward a glowing swimming pool that becomes visible ahead. The neon-lit building remains prominent on the right while palm trees line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop pool deck with neon lighting

events.description: slowing approach as camera nears the pool edge

agents.ego_description: approaching the illuminated swimming pool while observing the surrounding deck and city skyline

entered.detail: blue and white lights illuminating the pool from below the water surface
tall skyscraper with unique spire visible in the skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the infinity pool, which dominates the center of the frame with its glowing underwater lights. The distinctive tower rises prominently in the distant skyline. Lounge chairs pass by on either side as the deck opens up to reveal the full pool area surrounded by palm trees and neon-lit architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: infinity pool edge with panoramic city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking along the pool edge, observing the illuminated water and distant city skyline

entered.detail: edge of the pool deck where tiles meet the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the edge of the infinity pool, with the illuminated water filling the center of the view. The distinctive tower and surrounding skyline create a dramatic backdrop. The pool deck extends around the water while rain continues to fall, reflecting the ambient neon lights across the wet surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered rooftop walkway into an expansive, rain-soaked plaza overlooking a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline. It begins under the cover of a glass-railed walkway, moving past palm trees and artificial lighting toward the hazy city horizon. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide, exposed plaza where heavy rain falls over scattered lounge chairs and tiled surfaces. The view then expands as the camera advances toward a glowing infinity pool, with a prominent tower rising in the distant skyline and neon-lit architecture framing the path. Finally, the movement culminates at the pool's edge, where the illuminated water and wet surfaces reflect the vibrant ambient lights of the surrounding metropolis.
